Agreed. Self-distill was never really a great method anyway, most companies already tried it like two or three years ago. I recently read this paper (), and their experiments actually show that self-distilled data isn't truly on-policy at all, even if it looks like it. [...] i feel like trying to teach interpolation machine from 2017 (turns 9 in June 😻 ) mathematics and expect it to actually learn/generalize is foolhardy. which I guess is why people try to teach AIME, and not math

AIME and AMC aren't remotely "OOD" wrt DAPO-Math-17k in any real mathematical sense - They're both from the same narrow world of comp math. same stylistic conventions, answer formats, and difficulty levels etc

edit:

image

image

this matches something i've noticed anecdotally, distillation doesn't always behave the way you'd expect for reasoning tasks. good summary of what's actually going on here

## Models citing this paper 0

No model linking this paper [...] the part that grabbed me is how richer teacher conditioning actively suppresses epistemic verbalization, shortening reasoning traces but hurting out-of-distribution performance. they show this with off-policy and on-policy distillation across varying epistemic density and task coverage, which makes me wonder if there's a sweet spot that preserves minimal uncertainty signals while still gaining in-domain efficiency. a small but telling detail is that conditioning on full solutions makes the student imitate a concise, confident style, and arXivLens's breakdown does a nice job unpacking that mechanism, though i'd love an ablation that fixes answer length while varying explicit uncertainty prompts. also curious how this would translate to settings with human feedback or multi-round

results.title: [PDF] Why Does Self-Distillation (Sometimes) Degrade the Reasoning ...
results.content:
A key finding of this work is that self-distillation can suppress epistemic verbalization, thereby diminishing a model’s ability to express uncertainty during reasoning. This obser-vation carries important implications for the design of LLM post-training methods. The ability to appropriately express uncertainty is directly related to model reliability and safety.
Training procedures that indiscriminately suppress such expressions may increase the risk of models producing incorrect answers with unwarranted confidence. We hope that our analysis contributes to the development of more robust and trustworthy reasoning models. [...] In other words, in these domains, self-distillation suppresses epistemic verbalization and improves performance simultaneously. The key question is why the same mechanism leads to performance degradation in our math-focused setup. We hypothesize that the answer lies in differences in task coverage between the training and evaluation distributions. [...] While these works demonstrate the effectiveness of self-distillation, they do not investigate when or why self-distillation may degrade reasoning performance, especially in scenarios where a model must solve problems entirely on its own, without interaction with the external environment, which is the central question of our work.
Uncertainty Expression in LLM Reasoning.

results.title: Distillation Column Troubleshooting Part 1
results.content: Distillation column is one of the critical process equipment in refineries, petrochemical plants, gas processing plants and chemical plants. The performance of the plants depends on the ability of the distillation columns to function as intended. A distillation process running steady and delivering performance as per design can get upset by varieties of reasons. The consequence of these upsets depends on the nature and the intensity of problems. Such disturbances may lead to variations in finished product quality or reduction in capacity.  Identifying the reasons for the problems and taking timely corrective and preventive action to reduce loss of production needs operational experience and engineering skills.

## Introduction

intro

intro

Self-distillation lets a single model act as both teacher and student by conditioning the teacher on richer context (e.g., ground-truth solutions). It offers fine-grained credit assignment while keeping a simple setup, and has recently gained attention.

⚠️ However, in the math domain, self-distillation can lead to persistent performance degradation, even when the training signal points in the right direction. [...] ## Navigation Menu

results.title: Troubleshooting Distillation Column Malfunctions: Expert Guide
results.content:
In conclusion, tackling the challenges of troubleshooting distillation column malfunctions requires a comprehensive, well-rounded strategy. We must prioritize regular maintenance, leverage innovative technologies, and invest in ongoing training for our team. By doing so, we not only mitigate the risk of unexpected malfunctions but also ensure that our distillation columns operate at peak performance. Remember, a well-maintained system is a more efficient and cost-effective system, paving the way for long-term success.

## FAQ [...] Common problems in distillation columns include flooding, weeping, foaming, and pressure drops. Flooding occurs when the liquid overwhelms the column’s capacity, leading to reduced separation efficiency. Weeping happens when liquid leaks through the perforations of the trays without being adequately vaporized. Foaming can cause erratic flow patterns and reduced column efficiency due to the formation of bubbles in the liquid phase. Pressure drops can indicate blockages or restrictions within the column, leading to reduced throughput and efficiency.

## The Importance of Regular Maintenance and Troubleshooting in Ensuring Optimal Performance [...] In summary, understanding the essentials of distillation column operations, recognizing common problems, and prioritizing regular maintenance and troubleshooting are key to maintaining high standards of performance. At Ship & Shore Environmental, Inc., our goal is to provide comprehensive support and solutions to ensure the continuous and efficient functioning of your distillation processes.

## Identifying Signs of Distillation Column Malfunctions
